name: Captain Tsubasa RP (Kids' Dream Arc)
description:
Yo people from Janitor.Ai

Welcome to my second bot, as you can see, it is inspired (straight up made) by the captain Tsubasa anime (2018) This bot only follows the story through the "Kids' Dream" Arc (with every important team included), though I'm planning to make more bots following the next Arcs and maybe even one about the second season of the anime (The world youth arc), so if I see some support on this bot, I may keep going.

Now, the list of every team and player of this RPG

Teams and Players

Nankatsu Elementary School (main lineup):

GK: Akira Tsuboi (No. 1)

DF: Masato Nakazato (No. 2), Hiroshi Nagano (No. 3), Manabu Okawa (No. 4), Susumu Sakurai (No. 5)

MF: Tsuyoshi Oda (No. 6), Kenichi Iwami (No. 7), Shota Minowa (No. 8), Yutaka Murashige (No. 9)

FW: Tsubasa Ozora (No. 10), Ryo Ishizaki (No. 11), Taro Misaki

Shutetsu Elementary School

A-Team:

GK: Genzo Wakabayashi (No. 1, Captain)

DF: Kenta Shimada (No. 2), Kazuma Matsuno (No. 3), Kohei Nakamoto (No. 4), Shingo Takasugi (No. 6)

MF: Jun Kurata (No. 5), Takumi Osaki (No. 7), Kaito Inamura (No. 8), Mamoru Izawa (No. 10)

FW: Teppei Kisugi (No. 9), Hajime Taki (No. 11)

B-Team/Reserves:

GK: Ichiro Kanda, Umi Hikita

DF: Kanato Mochizuki, Hifumi Sugiyama, Taiyo Sano

MF: Naoki Oishi, Itsuki Masuda, Jun Muramatsu, Yuto Endo

FW: Ko Ota, Wataru Goto, Hajime Fujiwara

Meiwa FC:

MF: Takeshi Sawada

Kojiro Hyuga (FW), Masanobu Yamashita (GK), Naoto Murayama (DF), Yuta Mishima (DF), Ryujiro Shima (DF), Koichi Goto (DF), Takafumi Nikaido (MF), Teppei Tsuchiya (MF), Tomohiko Nakashima (MF), Masahiko Hasegawa (FW), Tsuyoshi Mochizuki (FW).

Noboru sawaki (FW)

Ken Wakashimazu (GK)

Azumaichi Middle School (Osaka)

Defeated Naniwa in prefectural finals; faced Nankatsu early in nationals.

Squad:

GK: Ryota Tsuji (No. 1)

DF: Daigo Sasaki (No. 2), Shohei Mihashi (No. 4), Junji Yamada (No. 5), Makoto Soda (No. 7)

MF: Yohei Kuramochi (No. 6), Toru Nakai (No. 8), Tatsuya Hayashi (No. 10)

FW: Koji Yoshida (No. 3), Mitsuru Ide (No. 9), Kazuyasu Onodera (No. 11)

Hirado Middle School (Nagasaki)

Strong defensive/physical team; reached quarterfinals vs. Nankatsu.

Squad:

GK: Akira Hatakeyama (No. 1)

DF: Toshio Akisawa (No. 2), Shinji Noda (No. 3), Hiroshi Jito (No. 5, key player), Kazuaki Soda (No. 8)
